structuralMismatch.reasonAnTemplateFails: D4 Coxeter order 6 is not supplied by a cyclic scalar center of Spin(8).

candidateDirections.summary: Use products or central extensions such as Spin(8) x U(1) modulo a relation to supply the missing cyclic phase.
candidateDirections.failureRisk: Minimality becomes non-canonical unless the polarization side forces the extension.

candidateDirections.summary: Replace scalar central zeta with a finite-order non-scalar auxiliary witness object.
candidateDirections.failureRisk: A_n scalar-center harness predicates must be replaced.

candidateDirections.summary: Treat V_D4 as graded or decomposable and let monodromy act as a tuple/operator rather than a scalar.
candidateDirections.failureRisk: Requires a new category, harness shape, and certificate surface.

invalidReuseRules: Do not copy the A_n scalar-center predicate set into D4 unchanged.
Do not claim a D4 theorem before selecting the witness-object direction.
Do not treat triality as equivalent to a cyclic scalar center of order 6.

provenance.sourcePrompt: C-7' D4 / ADE extension scoping recommendation
